commands.command: PATH="/opt/MediaCreator/infra/bin:$PATH" pnpm --dir /opt/MediaCreator/apps/web exec vitest run tests/unit/runtime-settings-panel.test.tsx tests/unit/diagnostics-panel.test.tsx
commands.name: phase26_web_unit_targeted

commands.command: PATH="/opt/MediaCreator/infra/bin:$PATH" PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH="/opt/MediaCreator/infra/playwright" pnpm --dir /opt/MediaCreator/apps/web exec playwright test tests/e2e/settings-diagnostics.spec.ts
commands.name: phase26_playwright_targeted

notes: Playwright workers are pinned to 1 in apps/web/playwright.config.js so the Next.js dev server does not hit intermittent invalid-hook failures under concurrent browser workers.
Generation remains truthful: final media generation still depends on a real ComfyUI service plus NAS-backed checkpoint and VAE files.
Local LoRA training remains truthful: the UI and API report unavailable when AI Toolkit is not installed.
